_meta.purpose: Wires Figma components in the AESDR brand-canon library to their React counterparts. After the Figma library exists (built per design-canon-seed/07-figma-prep/figma-assembly-guide.md), populate the placeholder figmaNode URLs in components/*.figma.ts files and run `figma connect publish`. See design-canon-seed/07-figma-prep/code-connect-runbook.md.
